title: Goa court grants bail to Ajay Gupta in nightclub fire case
description: A Goa sessions court on March 23 granted bail to Ajay Gupta, a partner in the business venture behind the Birch by Romeo Lane nightclub in Arpora, where a December 2025 fire killed 25 people including five tourists.Gupta, whose name appeared alongside the main accused Saurabh and Gaurav Luthra, was granted bail on a bond of ₹50,000. The Court directed him to surrender his passport and not leave the country or tamper with evidence. Gupta’s lawyer, advocate Rohan Desai, argued that his client had
